title: Batemannia meleagris
taxonomy: Batemannia meleagris is a genus of flowering plants in the family Strelitziaceae. It is a monotypic genus, consisting of a single species. The plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of the Ivory Coast and Ghana. The classification of Batemannia meleagris places it within the order Zingiberales. The exact classification may be subject to change as new research and discoveries are made in the field of botany.
